hypothesis: A hypothesis-generation system is more useful when every generated claim includes a measurable variable, a comparison design, and a falsification route before memory admission.
measurement_plan: Score generated packets before and after the gate using synthetic and public-source fixtures.
falsification_route: If gated packets do not improve testability scores or reduce unsupported promotions compared with ungated packets, weaken the hypothesis.
comparison_design: Compare gated versus ungated packets using the same fixture set and scoring rubric.
next_executable_action: Run this router against new hypothesis packets before provenance packet construction.

hypothesis: A recurring symbolic phrase may indicate a real longitudinal signal.
next_executable_action: Translate symbolic phrase into measurable variables before review.

hypothesis: This protocol cures glaucoma and heart disease in animals.
falsification_route: If measures do not improve, reject the claim.
next_executable_action: Reject as written and rewrite as research-organization question with clinical source mapping.

hypothesis: Private raw transcripts can be retained to improve longitudinal research memory.
measurement_plan: Compare raw transcript retention to deidentified signal packets.
falsification_route: If deidentified packets preserve utility without raw retention, reject raw retention.
comparison_design: Raw transcript retention versus deidentified packet retention.
next_executable_action: Replace raw transcript storage with deidentified feature packets.

hypothesis: A literature triage queue may improve discovery readiness for medical AI papers.
measurement_plan: Score papers before and after triage.
falsification_route: If triage does not reduce missing source status or improve review speed, weaken the claim.
comparison_design: Triage queue versus unstructured reading list.
